text:
{
  "isSuspicious": true,
  "deviation": "ntdsutil.exe is being used to create an 'Install From Media' (IFM) snapshot of the Active Directory database (ntds.dit) and write it to a temporary directory. This is a common technique for credential dumping (MITRE ATT&CK T1003.003). The directory name 'ntds_T1003' explicitly references this ATT&CK technique.",
  "indicators": [
    "ntdsutil.exe",
    "write ntds.dit",
    "VSS snapshot",
    "credential dumping",
    "T1003.003",
    "C:\\Windows\\Temp\\ntds_T1003\\Active Directory\\ntds.dit"
  ]
}
